description: Style Note ganuchi gives you a high fashion shoe with this pair. Wear it for that stylish touch to your outfit and give your entire look an edgy addition with this pair. Product Details Round toed red shoes with central lace-ups Fabric upper with leather overlays and branding on the side Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Soft footbed Upper stitched to the outsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves Material and Care Fabric and leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
